name: Filestack
description: Filestack — File upload and transformation API with CDN delivery, document conversion, and virus scanning.

seo.title: Filestack — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Filestack: Filestack — File upload and transformation API with CDN delivery, document conversion, and virus scanning.

when_to_use: File upload API with CDN delivery and virus scanning
Document format conversion (PDF/DOCX) via processing API
User file uploads directly to cloud storage bypassing servers
Image transformation and optimization from upload onward
Multi-source file picker supporting Dropbox, Google Drive, S3

pros: Upload widget drops in with 2 lines of code
Handles large files, chunked and resumable
Virus scanning and content moderation add-ons
cons: Pricing climbs fast past free tier
Occasional outages reported in status history
API surface scattered across product lines
review.verdict: Fast way to add rich file uploads to any app — pricing and transforms weaker than Cloudinary at scale.
review.best_for: Product teams wanting plug-in upload widgets with source pickers and basic transforms.
review.not_for: Teams doing heavy image/video transformation — Cloudinary leads there.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
